'''Swamp Tar''' is a resource item.

==Journal==
{{Journal entry|
Once this tar was some living creature, perhaps and ancient dragon or other colossal beast. Time and pressure refined it down into this sticky substance that can be used for a variety of crafting purposes. 
}}
